title: 10 Herbal Teas For Bursitis
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas contains compounds like glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory properties. Glycyrrhizin helps reduce swelling and pain by inhibiting the production of prostaglandins, hormone-like substances that cause inflammation. The flavonoids present in Glycyrrhiza glabra tea, such as liquiritin and isolarictin, have antioxidant properties that help protect against oxidative stress and damage to joint tissues.
